query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed my research on Magnificent 7 large M&A activity in 2026. Here's the summary of key findings:

## Key Findings

**No confirmed NEW $10B+ acquisition was announced by a Mag 7 company specifically in mid-2026 (June–July 2026).** However, there are significant closed/pending deals from earlier in 2026 and active rumors:

### Confirmed/Closed $10B+ Deals
1. **Alphabet–Wiz: $32B** (all-cash, CLOSED March 11, 2026) — Google's largest acquisition ever; biggest pure cybersecurity deal on record.
2. **Nvidia–Groq: $20B** (announced Dec 2025) — Nvidia's largest deal, structured as a nonexclusive license + acquihire. Senators Warren/Blumenthal challenged its antitrust structure on March 20, 2026 — an active story.
3. **Meta–Scale AI: ~$14.3B** (49% stake, June 2025) — ongoing 2026 developments including a $500M Pentagon contract in May 2026.

### Active Rumors (mid-2026)
4. **Apple–Perplexity AI: ~$14B** — would be Apple's largest-ever, but talks reportedly stalled.
5. **Nvidia–Dell/HP** — rumored April 2026, officially **denied** by Nvidia.

### Notable Context
- Mag 7 2026 capex guidance ~**$725B** (up ~77% YoY), pushing companies toward licensing/partnership "reverse acquihire" structures (like Nvidia-Groq) rather than outright acquisitions — partly to sidestep antitrust review.
- Total tech M&A heading toward ~$4 trillion in 2026, strongest since 2021.
- **No confirmed Tesla or Amazon $10B+ external acquisition** in 2026.

**Caveat:** AskNews real-time news tools were unavailable (rate/credit limits), so findings rely on web search. The Nvidia-Groq deal is the closest to a "pending big deal under scrutiny" as of June–July 2026, while Apple-Perplexity is the most notable active rumor.

Sources:
- [Times of Israel — Google completes $32B Wiz deal](https://www.timesofisrael.com/in-biggest-exit-in-israeli-history-google-completes-32-billion-deal-to-buy-wiz/)
- [Bloomberg Law — Nvidia's $20B Groq Deal Queried by Warren, Blumenthal](https://news.bloomberglaw.com/antitrust/nvidias-20-billion-groq-deal-queried-by-warren-blumenthal)
- [TIME — How Meta's $14B Deal Upended the AI Data Industry](https://time.com/7294699/meta-scale-ai-data-industry/)
- [TechFundingNews — Apple eyes $14B Perplexity acquisition](https://techfundingnews.com/apple-considering-14b-perplexity-acquisition/)
- [Yahoo Finance — Nvidia denies PC maker acquisition talks](https://finance.yahoo.com/video/nvidia-denies-rumors-that-its-in-acquisition-talks-with-pc-maker-210613217.html)
- [WebProNews — Megadeals Power Tech M&A Toward $4 Trillion in 2026](https://www.webpronews.com/megadeals-power-tech-ma-surge-toward-4-trillion-in-2026/)

key_facts: Alphabet closed its $32 billion all-cash acquisition of cloud-security firm Wiz on March 11, 2026 — the largest acquisition in Google's history.

Nvidia's $20 billion Groq deal (announced Dec 2025) is its largest ever, structured as a nonexclusive license plus executive hires; Senators Warren and Blumenthal questioned its antitrust structure on March 20, 2026.
Meta's ~$14.3-14.8 billion Scale AI deal (49% non-voting stake, announced June 2025) continues to generate 2026 developments, including a $500M Pentagon contract for Scale AI in May 2026.
Apple is rumored to be considering a ~$14 billion acquisition of Perplexity AI — which would be its largest ever — but reports indicate talks have stalled as of mid-2026.
Nvidia acquisition rumors involving a PC maker (Dell/HP) surfaced April 13, 2026 but were officially denied by Nvidia.
No confirmed new $10B+ definitive acquisition was announced by a Mag 7 company specifically in mid-2026 (June-July 2026).
Mag 7 (Alphabet, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta) 2026 capex guidance is roughly $725 billion, up about 77% year-over-year.
Companies are increasingly using licensing/partnership 'reverse acquihire' structures instead of outright acquisitions, partly to avoid antitrust merger review.

Microsoft's OpenAI stake was valued at ~$135 billion (~27%) after OpenAI's Oct 2025 recapitalization; the partnership was revised in April 2026 to be non-exclusive with a revenue-share cap (not an acquisition).
No confirmed Tesla or Amazon $10B+ external acquisition in 2026; Tesla-SpaceX merger speculation exists but is not a Mag 7 acquisition.

data_points.metric: Meta Scale AI investment (49% non-voting stake)
Apple rumored acquisition of Perplexity AI (stalled)
Total tech M&A deal value trajectory for 2026
